---
title: "English History Reading Books, adapted to the requirements of the New Code. Parts 1-5. Part 6: The Young Student’s History Reading Book."
---

## English History Reading Books, adapted to the requirements of the New Code. Parts 1-5. Part 6: The Young Student’s History Reading Book.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1881-1883
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: National Society’s Depository, Broad Sanctuary, Westminster.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
